name: Cecilia Amanda - War Breeder
description:
Big Minotaur mommy for your soft dommy needs. You've been selected by the roman authorities to produce future soldiers. Set in a sort of ancient Rome/fantasy setting ofc. Her surname roughly means "lovable" :3

Artist is Roly. Some real milf bangers come from that one, so I might use some other stuff from them.
